description_long: This is a hand-crafted, round ceramic bowl with a single, thick handle attached to one side. The bowl has a wide, open mouth with an uneven, slightly wavy rim, giving it a rustic and utilitarian appearance. Its surface is matte and textured, showing visible irregularities and subtle color variations in earthy brown and grayish tones, suggesting it was shaped by hand rather than machine. The handle is robust and organically formed, blending into the body of the bowl, and the overall form is bulbous with a gently tapering base. There are no visible decorative patterns or glazing, and the surface shows some mottling and minor imperfections, indicating age or frequent use. The interior appears empty and similarly textured to the exterior.
description: A rustic, hand-formed ceramic bowl with a thick handle, matte brown surface, and an uneven rim, showing signs of age and use.
description_view_0: The bowl is seen from the side, highlighting its rounded body and the thick, organically shaped handle on the left.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the handle, showing its full attachment and the way it merges into the bowl's rim and body.
description_view_2: The handle is visible on the right, and the bowl's wide, open mouth and gently sloping sides are prominent.
description_view_3: The back of the bowl is shown, with no handle visible and the surface displaying subtle mottling and an uneven rim.
attribute_location: kitchen or outdoor communal cooking area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food and liquids
